projects.name: Nexus Runtime Core
projects.description: Self-improving v1→v100 local agent loop. Beats Opus 4.6 with 90% local / 10% rescue.

epics.title: v1→v100 Continuous Loop
epics.description: Launch and stabilise the continuous task loop

tasks.title: Launch continuous task loop (v6→v1000)
tasks.description: Start orchestrator/main.py --auto 6. Verify it runs tasks end-to-end, logs quality scores, and loops without stopping. Confirm state.json is updated every version.

tasks.title: Switch task suite to real-world 100 tasks
tasks.description: Replace benchmark task set with 100 real-world tasks covering: scaffold, refactor, code_gen, tdd, arch, debug. Update benchmarks/ task list file.

tasks.title: Auto-merge passing PRs (#27-#34)
tasks.description: Run scripts/auto_merge_pr.sh to merge all open PRs with passing CI. Rebase conflicts on main with force-push-with-lease.

tasks.title: Track velocity per version → reports/velocity.jsonl
tasks.description: After each version completes, append {version, tasks_done, avg_quality, elapsed_s, timestamp} to reports/velocity.jsonl. Read by dashboard benchmarker panel.

epics.title: Agent Quality & Capabilities
epics.description: Improve agent quality scores and add missing capabilities

tasks.title: Deploy context_optimizer.py for token compression
tasks.description: Wire context_optimizer.py into agent_runner.py so every task prompt is compressed before the Ollama call. Target: 30% token reduction without quality loss.

tasks.title: Project scaffolding agent (scaffolder.py)
tasks.description: Create local-agents/agents/scaffolder.py. Capabilities: scaffold a new project from templates/. CLI: nexus scaffold fastapi my-app. Register in ROUTING_TABLE under scaffold category.

tasks.title: ProceduralMemory + context injector
tasks.description: Create local-agents/memory/procedural.py: save/load/rank memories. Build injector that prepends top-3 relevant memories to each agent prompt before execution.

projects.name: Nexus Dashboard
projects.description: Local runtime dashboard. Never goes down. Stale alert fires at 10s. All work handled by frontend_agent only — never Claude main.

epics.title: Never-Down Guarantee
epics.description: Dashboard must always show data. Stale banner fires after 10s. Updater auto-restarts on crash.

tasks.title: Keep state.json updated every 2s (live_state_updater.py daemon)
tasks.description: Run python3 dashboard/live_state_updater.py as background daemon. It must write state.json every 2s with live agent status. Verify: tail -f dashboard/state.json shows updates.

tasks.title: Cron: restart live_state_updater.py on crash (every 1 min)
tasks.description: Add cron: */1 * * * * pgrep -f live_state_updater.py || python3 /full/path/dashboard/live_state_updater.py &. Test: kill -9 the process, verify it restarts within 60s.

tasks.title: Stale-data test — verify banner appears after 15s server kill
tasks.description: Test: kill dashboard server, wait 15s, confirm stale banner is visible with correct age. Restart server, confirm banner disappears within 3s of fresh data arriving.

tasks.title: Cron: keep live_state_updater.py always running
tasks.description: Add cron: */1 * * * * pgrep -f live_state_updater.py || python3 /Users/jimmymalhan/Documents/local-agent-runtime/local-agents/dashboard/live_state_updater.py &. Test: kill the process, verify restart within 60s. Prevents dashboard empty values.

tasks.title: Regression test: live_state_updater must write benchmark_scores and token_usage on every tick
tasks.description: Write tests/test_live_state_updater.py. After each tick(), assert: benchmark_scores has >= 1 version key, token_usage has claude_tokens field, ts is within 5s of now. Run on every loop start.

tasks.title: state_writer.update_agent() must write quality field
tasks.description: update_agent() in dashboard/state_writer.py writes status/task/elapsed_s but NOT quality. Add quality=0 default param. All agents must call update_agent(name, status, task, quality=result_quality) after each run. Without this, agent cards show blank quality score on dashboard.

tasks.title: sub_agents model field must be populated — model chips show blank
tasks.description: state_writer.update_sub_agents() accepts model but executor sub_agents write model="" (empty string). Fix: SubAgentPool must pass model=AGENT_META["model"] (e.g. "qwen2.5-coder:7b") for each worker dict. Without this, model chip on sub-agent cards shows blank.

tasks.title: live_state_updater must synthesize recent_tasks from v*_compare.jsonl
tasks.description: state.json recent_tasks is null because live_state_updater never reads it. Fix: in tick(), read last 10 entries across all v*_compare.jsonl files, build [{task_id, title, category, agent_used, status, local_quality}] and write to state["recent_tasks"]. This populates the Tasks tab activity feed.

tasks.title: orchestrator must call state_writer.update_version_changelog() after each version
tasks.description: version_changelog:{} because orchestrator/main.py never calls update_version_changelog(). Fix: after each version loop completes, call update_version_changelog(version, changes=["tasks done", "avg quality", "win rate"]) from dashboard.state_writer. This populates CEO tab changelog section.

tasks.title: agents must call state_writer.add_research_finding() when they discover patterns
tasks.description: research_feed:[] because no agent calls add_research_finding(). Fix: researcher.py and benchmarker.py must call add_research_finding(finding, source, confidence) after each analysis. Also add synthetic entries from compare files in live_state_updater when win_rate changes. Populates Logs tab.

tasks.title: live_state_updater must write projects task counts from projects.json
tasks.description: Dashboard Projects tab shows empty epics/task counts because live_state_updater never reads projects/projects.json. Fix: in tick(), read projects.json, compute per-project stats (total/done/in_progress/blocked), write to state["projects_summary"]. Server already has /api/projects endpoint.

epics.title: Dashboard UI Features
epics.description: Live company projects panel, frontend_agent status card, epics view

tasks.title: Company projects panel — poll /api/projects every 2s
tasks.description: Epics as collapsible sections, tasks as rows with status badges (pending/in_progress/done/blocked). Write outputs to generated/projects/, update state.json.

tasks.title: frontend_agent status card in Agents tab
tasks.description: Add frontend_agent to the Agents tab card grid. Show current task, quality score, project (jobs.hil-tad.com), and last activity. Poll from state.json.

projects.name: jobs.hil-tad.com
projects.description: Job board frontend. React 18+, TypeScript, Tailwind. UX: usability, accessibility, design system.

epics.title: Core Components
epics.description: Essential UI components for job listings

tasks.title: JobCard component (React/TS, Tailwind)
tasks.description: Create JobCard.tsx. Props: title, company, location, salary, tags (string[]), remote (bool). Card with apply button, company logo placeholder, tag chips. Export default.

tasks.title: JobList — responsive grid with pagination
tasks.description: Create JobList.tsx. Accepts jobs: Job[]. 3-column responsive grid of JobCards. Pagination: 12 per page. Empty state: No jobs found with illustration placeholder.

tasks.title: FilterBar + Zustand store with URL sync
tasks.description: Create FilterBar.tsx + useJobStore.ts (Zustand). Filters: keyword, location, remote toggle, salary range. Store persists to localStorage. URL sync via query params.

tasks.title: Design system tokens (colors, spacing, typography)
tasks.description: Create tokens.ts with brand colors, spacing scale (4px base), type scale, border radii. Export as Tailwind config extension and CSS custom properties. Document each token.

epics.title: Quality & Accessibility
epics.description: WCAG AA compliance, usability testing, UX polish

tasks.title: Accessibility audit + WCAG AA fixes
tasks.description: Run axe-core on all components. Fix: contrast ≥4.5:1, keyboard nav (Tab/Enter/Esc), ARIA labels, focus indicators. Output: accessibility-report.md with before/after.

tasks.title: Usability prototype — 5 user flows (browse/apply/filter/saved/profile)
tasks.description: Build clickable prototype covering: browse jobs, apply, filter, saved jobs, profile. Each flow max 3 clicks. Document friction points found.

projects.name: Agent Infrastructure
projects.description: Continuous loop engine, DAG task ordering, memory system, parallel executor.

epics.title: Continuous Loop Engine
epics.description: Auto-pull task from DAG, run via run_project_task(), commit result, loop indefinitely

tasks.title: Wire continuous_loop.py to pull from projects.json
tasks.description: Update orchestrator/continuous_loop.py to call next_project_task() on each iteration. When project queue is empty, fall back to benchmark task generation. Log project_id + epic_id per task.

tasks.title: DAG task ordering — respect epic depends_on
tasks.description: Update ProjectManager.next_task() to skip epics whose depends_on list contains incomplete epics. Only surface tasks from unblocked epics. Add test: epic B blocked until epic A done.

tasks.title: Parallel executor — run up to 3 tasks concurrently
tasks.description: Use parallel_executor.py to run up to 3 independent tasks simultaneously (different epics, no file overlap). Cap at ResourceGuard limits. Update state.json with all in-progress tasks.

epics.title: Memory System
epics.description: Procedural memory for agents — save learned patterns, inject into prompts

tasks.title: ProceduralMemory class (save/load/rank)
tasks.description: Create local-agents/memory/procedural.py. Methods: save(pattern, quality), load_top(n=3, category), prune(min_quality=50). Storage: reports/learned_patterns.jsonl. Add unit tests.

tasks.title: Context injector — prepend top-3 memories to agent prompts
tasks.description: In agent_runner.py, before each Ollama call: query ProceduralMemory.load_top(3, category=task.category), prepend as system context. Measure quality delta on 10 tasks.
